# Code of Conduct

This project adopts the [Contributor Covenant, version 2.1](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/) as its Code of Conduct.

Contributors, maintainers, and participants are expected to follow it in issues, pull requests, discussions, commit messages, and other project spaces.

## Reporting

Report unacceptable behavior privately through a [GitHub security advisory](https://github.com/NearlCrews/signalk-nearlcrews-ui/security/advisories/new) or contact [@NearlCrews](https://github.com/NearlCrews) through GitHub. Reports will be reviewed promptly, fairly, and with respect for the reporter's privacy and safety.

The project follows the [Contributor Covenant enforcement guidelines](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2.1/code_of_conduct/#enforcement-guidelines).
